lectures.text:
The gradient gives the direction of steepest increase.

Gradient descent uses the gradient to update the current point.

A filler paragraph discusses implementation details.

A second filler paragraph remains unrelated.

A distant topic concerns boundary conditions.

lectures.text:
A parameter estimate is denoted by \(\theta\).

A filler paragraph separates the two objects.

Another filler paragraph contains no shared names.

An asymptotic expression contains \(\theta^2\).
